code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test22-JUN-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and high urine protein, indicating possible proteinuria. Urine is cloudy, brown, with low specific gravity, and contains glucose, ketones, and bilirubin, but no nitrites or leukocytes. Hemoglobin A1c is low, possibly due to anemia or recent blood loss. Findings are consistent with renal impairment and abnormal urine findings; further clinical correlation and nephrology evaluation are recommended.
